channel.title: PNallDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from PNallDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Rep. John Rose Urges House to Pass DHS Funding Bill Before Trump Orders Lapse
item.description: Congressman John Rose called on House Republicans to advance the Department of Homeland Security funding bill before temporary emergency measures put in place by President Trump expire.

item.title: Morning Minute: 'But I Play One on TV...'
Conservative PAC Launches Campaign Against House Republicans on Immigration
item.description: The Homeland Political Action Committee, a newly formed conservative super PAC, is targeting Republican House incumbents in the 2026 midterms over their immigration bill positions.

item.title: More Than a Dozen Democrats Call on Trump Administration to Protect Iranians in U.S.
item.description: Democratic lawmakers signed a letter urging the Trump administration to provide protection for Iranian nationals in the U.S. who would face risks if returned to Iran.

item.title: Man Who Attacked Rep. Ilhan Omar Changes Plea in Federal Case
